extraction.one_line_summary: DENNIS Rowan won the stage 16 ITT, but DUMOULIN Tom limited losses to 22 seconds behind Dennis while YATES Simon survived to retain pink by 56 seconds over DUMOULIN.
tactical_patterns: DUMOULIN Tom finished 22 seconds behind stage winner DENNIS but gained massively on GC rivals, moving to 56 seconds down.
YATES Simon's post-race comment about defensive tactics reveals increased conservatism with enlarged gap to chasers beyond DUMOULIN.
ARU Fabio unexpectedly slower than MARTIN Tony despite being Italian TT champion, suggesting form issues in third week.

rider_signals.DENNIS Rowan: positive: Won ITT decisively, 1:14 ahead of Martin, showcasing BMC's TT strength in Giro third week.
rider_signals.DUMOULIN Tom: positive: Finished only 22 seconds behind Dennis while gaining time on other GC contenders, moved to 56 seconds off pink.
rider_signals.YATES Simon: negative: Survived but acknowledged need for defensive tactics, suggesting vulnerability awareness despite 56-second gap.
rider_signals.ARU Fabio: negative: Posted slower time than Tony Martin despite being Australian TT champion, unexpected weakness in discipline.
rider_signals.FROOME Chris: neutral: Finished in top times but fell to 3:11 down, positioning too far back for GC threat.
